get.summary:
Checks if a company's subscription plan is valid.
Depending on the response, the next action could be to lock the company. (Auth roles: Admin)

Gets the Utc until which the subscription plan is valid for a given company.
This can be used to alert the companies when their subscription will expire and they need to renew. (Auth roles: Admin)

patch.summary:
Processes storage messages from the company storage azure queue and updates (increases or decreases) the Api.Data.Models.Core.Company.UsageTotalBlobsSizeInBytes accordingly.
This must be called every few minutes to keep the Company storage usage up to date.
If the response has failed messages, those messages can be retried again later. Or placed in a dead letter queue (or other persistent storage) for further investigation. (Auth roles: Admin)

parameters.name: maxMessages
parameters.description: messages to process in one run. e.g. 10

patch.summary:
This API is for admin to manually set or refresh the storage consumption for a Company.
Always compute the storage consumption for the Company by scanning all blobs using a logic app or function app then call this method.
Otherwise, when the usageTotalBlobsSizeInBytes is not specified, this is a heavy operation and cause API/SQL DB to slow down a lot. (Auth roles: Admin)

parameters.name: usageTotalBlobsSizeInBytes
parameters.description: Currently this is a heavy call when usageTotalBlobsSizeInBytes is not specified.

Comma separated list of permitted hosts from which public data can be accessed.
e.g. "www.example.com,subdomain.example.com"
These will be validated against the HTTP request Referrer header when fetching the blob.

User can be redirected to this url to complete the subscription purchase or upgrade. (Audited)  (Auth roles: 1.0.0,2.0.0,2.3.0)

parameters.name: renewsOnExpiry
parameters.description:
When true, the subscription plan will be renewed on expiry date.
            When false, the subscription plan will not be renewed once it expires

post.summary:
Cancels the current subscription for the company.
Company will be locked when the current subscription expires and will need to subscribe to a new plan to get access again. (Audited)  (Auth roles: 1.0.0,2.0.0,2.3.0)
Returns paginated subscription payment history for the current company in descending order. (Auth roles: 1.0.0,2.0.0,2.2.0)
Returns paginated subscription payment history for the specified company in descending order. (Auth roles: Admin,PaymentProcessor)

Processes payment for a subscription after an update from the Payment Gateway.
This should be called from a Function/Logic app that is triggered based on Queue that stores responses from Payment Gateway. (Audited)  (Auth roles: Admin,PaymentProcessor)

Cancel the current subscription for the specifed company.
This will cause the cuurent subscription to be immediately stopped. (Audited)  (Auth roles: Admin,PaymentProcessor)

post.summary:
Authenticates a user with username and password. Returns JWT token and refresh token.
Supports optional 2FA via email OTP. User must confirm email and terms before login.

Authenticates a client application using OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow (API key auth).
Returns a short-lived JWT token for service-to-service authentication.
Authenticates a user with a Google identity token and returns Buildatics access and refresh tokens.
Authenticates a user with a Microsoft Entra ID token and returns Buildatics access and refresh tokens.
Exchanges a valid refresh token and expired access token pair for a new access token set.

totalCount.description: The total number of objects in the database.

maxBlobStorageInBytes.description: Maximum blob storage in bytes (e.g., 5 GB = 5,368,709,120 bytes)

price.description:
Price per billing period.
0 implies free plan.

billingPeriodDays.description: Billing period in days (e.g., 30 for monthly, 365 for yearly)

logoBlobUrl.description: Public Url with readonly SAS of company Logo

currentSubscriptionPlanId.description: Current active subscription for this company

uiThemeJson.description:
Json string to store user specific UI theme customizations like dark mode, font size etc.
UI determines this value and sends it to the backend to store whenever user makes any changes in theme customizations.

note.description: Optional short note shown to admins/users for this template.

jsonConfig.description: Optional UI configuration JSON used when creating brochures from this template.

isAvailable.description: Indicates whether the template is visible to non-admin brochure APIs.

UpdateBrochureTemplateAReq.description: Request payload for updating brochure template metadata.

notificationEmail.description:
Email Id to which notifications such as Shift Start will be sent.
In case this is not available, email the Owner's email id

publicDataPermittedHostsCsv.description:
Comma separated list of permitted hosts from which public data can be accessed.
e.g. "www.example.com,subdomain.example.com"
These will be validated against the HTTP request Referrer header when fetching the blob.

publicCompanyDesignStyle.description: The value (could be string or json) for style attribute for the public company designs.

clickUpCompanyId.description:
Id of the company in ClickUp
When this is null it indicates that clickup integration is not enabled.

roles.description: Directly and Indirectly (via designation) assigned roles to the User/Staff

deletedOnUtc.description: Indicates if the User/Staff was Soft Deleted

termsAndConditionsAcceptedOnUtc.description:
The timestamp when the user accepted the Terms and Conditions on the Api.Poco.Dtos.User.UserDetailedRes.TermsAndConditionsUrl
Null when there are new terms and conditions or if user has not accepted yet.

termsAndConditionsUrl.description:
Public Url associated with the Terms and Conditions accepted by the user
UI will send this value when the user has accepted.
Null when there are new terms and conditions or if user has not accepted yet.

items.description: The collection of objects belonging to this page.

totalCount.description: The total number of objects in the database.

termsAndConditionsAcceptedOnUtc.description:
The timestamp when the user accepted the Terms and Conditions on the Api.Poco.Dtos.User.UserProfileRes.TermsAndConditionsUrl
Null when there are new terms and conditions or if user has not accepted yet.

termsAndConditionsUrl.description:
Public Url associated with the Terms and Conditions accepted by the user
UI will send this value when the user has accepted.
Null when there are new terms and conditions or if user has not accepted yet.

uiThemeJson.description:
Json string to store user specific UI theme customizations like dark mode, font size etc.
UI determines this value and sends it to the backend to store whenever user makes any changes in theme customizations.

hasExpired.description: When true, then the next action can be to lock the company and/or notify the user.

oauth2.description: Standard Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "bearer {token}"
oauth2.name: Authorization

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Provides API for registering new users and other account management related functions.

tags.name: ClickupA
tags.description:
Provides admin-only proxy endpoints for querying ClickUp data from the Buildatics API.
These endpoints help validate ClickUp connectivity and inspect remote tasks without calling ClickUp directly from the client.

tags.name: CompanyClickUpTasksA
tags.description:
Manages company-scoped ClickUp task records across all tenants from an admin perspective.
These endpoints support inspection, paging, and maintenance of ClickUp tasks synchronized into Buildatics.

tags.name: StripeSessionsA
tags.description: Used for house keeping

tags.name: AuditLogs
tags.description:
Provides APIs for retrieving audit logs that track all changes made within the company.
Audit logs record user actions including create, update, and delete operations for audit trail and compliance purposes.

tags.name: BlobMapLabels
tags.description: Manages Document/Blob labels that can be assigned to BlobMaps for categorisation and filtering.

tags.name: BlobMaps
tags.description: Manages Documents/BlobMaps — metadata records that associate uploaded blobs/documents with owner entities and labels.

tags.name: Brochures
tags.description: Manages tenant brochures stored as HTML blobs via BlobMap/BlobModel.

tags.name: BrochureTemplates
tags.description:
Provides read-only brochure template endpoints for users with brochure read permissions.
Returns only templates that are marked as available.

tags.name: CompanyClickUpTasks
tags.description:
Integrates Clickup task management with the Buildatics platform.
Allows querying and synchronizing Clickup tasks associated with a company's work items and projects.

tags.name: Company
tags.description:
Provides company-scoped APIs for viewing and maintaining the current tenant's company profile and branding data.
These endpoints expose the core organization record used throughout the platform.

tags.name: CompanyDesignBlobs
tags.description:
Manages blob (file/image) attachments for company designs.
Blobs store images and files that are referenced by design objects and contribute to company storage usage.

tags.name: CompanyDesignCustomFields
tags.description:
Manages custom fields for company designs, allowing companies to extend design metadata with application-specific attributes.
Custom fields can store additional information relevant to the company's design requirements.

tags.name: CompanyDesignFacadeMaps
tags.description:
Manages the relationships between company designs and facade elements used within those designs.
Allows designs to include multiple facade components for architectural visualization.

tags.name: CompanyDesigns
tags.description:
Manages company-specific design library items. Companies can create, customize, and organize designs from the system library.
Supports versioning, status management (Available, Archived), and website visibility controls for display center integration.

tags.name: CompanyFacadeBlobMaps
tags.description:
Manages blob (file) attachments for company facades.
Handles the association between facade design elements and their related images/files.

tags.name: CompanyFacades
tags.description:
Manages company facade library items used in building design visualization.
Facades are reusable architectural design elements that can be attached to designs and managed at the company level.
Supports versioning, status management, and blob (image) attachments.

tags.name: Contacts
tags.description:
Manages company contacts and their associated address information.
Contacts can be referenced from various entities (leads, projects, stages, tasks) and support soft delete.
Only company owners can manage contacts for their organization.

tags.name: ContactTypes
tags.description:
Manages contact type classifications used to categorize contacts within a company (e.g., Owner, Agent, Contractor).
Contact types help organize and filter contacts for assignment and relationship mapping.

tags.name: Designations
tags.description:
Allows to manage Designations that Staff within a Company can have
e.g. Supervisor, Tradie, Project Manager etc

tags.name: DesignationToModuleAppRoleMap
tags.description: Allows to manage the permissions for Designations by mapping them to ModuleAppRoles.

tags.name: Designs
tags.description:
Provides read-only access to system-provided design templates that users can view and import into their company libraries.
Design templates serve as starting points for companies to create their own customized designs.

tags.name: HtmlPageTemplates
tags.description:
Manages company-accessible HTML page templates used to render branded documents and hosted HTML content.
Templates can be downloaded with the caller's access token injected so the rendered page can call protected APIs.

tags.name: HttpIntegrations
tags.description: Generaic Http query execution controller for all integrated services

tags.name: ModuleAppRoles
tags.description:
Retrieves the module permission roles that a company can assign to staff designations.
These roles define feature-level access such as read, create, update, and delete permissions across application modules.

tags.name: Staff
tags.description:
Manages staff user accounts, roles, and designations within a company.
Staff users have assigned designations that grant them module-specific permissions for access control.
Only company owners can manage staff within their organization.

tags.name: StaticValues
tags.description: Provides APIs for get all Enums.

tags.name: Subscription
tags.description:
Provides APIs to manage company subscription.
These can be accessed even if company is locked.

tags.name: SubscriptionPaymentHistory
tags.description: Provides paginated access to subscription payment history for the current company.

tags.name: UserProfile
tags.description:
Provides authenticated-user APIs for reading and updating the current user's profile, roles, and API key settings.
These endpoints manage the caller's personal account data rather than company-wide configuration.

tags.name: LeadActivityLogs
tags.description:
Manages the activity timeline for a sales lead, including manual notes and system-generated events.
Activity logs provide the engagement history used by sales teams to understand lead progress and follow-up actions.

tags.name: LeadBlobMaps
tags.description:
Manages file and image attachments associated with sales leads.
These endpoints support storing proposal documents, reference files, and other lead-specific assets in blob storage.

tags.name: LeadDesigns
tags.description:
Manages the company designs linked to a sales lead during preconstruction and quoting workflows.
These links let sales users track which design options have been discussed or proposed for a lead.

tags.name: LeadQuoteLineItems
tags.description:
Manages the individual line items that make up a lead quote in the sales module.
Line items capture the itemized pricing, quantities, and cost breakdown used to build a proposal.

tags.name: LeadQuotes
tags.description:
Manages quotations generated for Sales leads, supporting multi-quote tracking and quote-to-order workflows.
Enables sales teams to generate, update, and track multiple quotes per lead with status management.

tags.name: Leads
tags.description:
Manages Sales leads—prospects or clients being tracked through the sales pipeline—with full CRUD and pagination support.
Supports lead prioritization, status management, activity tracking, and assignment to sales staff.

tags.name: LeadStages
tags.description:
Manages the company-owned sales pipeline stages that define how leads progress through the sales process.
These stages act as reusable workflow configuration for categorizing leads such as prospecting, quoting, and closing.

tags.name: LeadTasks
tags.description:
Associates tasks with individual Sales leads for activity planning and follow-up management within the sales process.
Enables sales teams to track action items and milestones tied to specific prospects.

tags.name: QuoteTemplates
tags.description:
Manages reusable company-owned quote templates for the sales module.
These templates let the UI store structured defaults and apply them when building quotations.

tags.name: PublicCompanyDesigns
tags.description: Allows anonymous access to company's deisgns.

tags.name: BrochureTemplatesA
tags.description:
Provides admin-only CRUD endpoints for brochure templates.
Brochure templates are uploaded files (e.g. PDFs, images) that admins manage
for use across the platform.

tags.name: ClientsA
tags.description:
Provides API for managing the Clients for the users with Admin role. 
Supports both Bearer Token and ApiKey Authorization

tags.name: CompaniesA
tags.description: Provides API for managing the companies for the users with Admin role.

tags.name: ContactTypesA
tags.description:
Provides system-wide admin APIs for managing contact type classifications across all companies.
Admin users can create, update, and delete contact types that are available for use by companies.
Contact types are system-scoped and can be reused across multiple companies.

tags.name: DesignCustomFieldsA
tags.description:
Provides admin APIs for managing custom fields at the system design template level.
Admin users can extend design metadata with application-specific attributes used across system templates.

tags.name: DesignsA
tags.description:
Provides admin APIs for managing system-wide design templates.
Admin and design admins can create, update, and manage design templates that are available for company import.
Includes design versioning, status management (Active, Deprecated), and design customization features.

tags.name: DummyDataA
tags.description: Provides API for managing the DummyData for the users with Admin role.

tags.name: EmailTemplatesA
tags.description:
Provides admin APIs for managing email templates used across the system.
Admin users can define and customize email templates for system notifications and communications.
Templates support variable placeholders for dynamic content.

tags.name: GoogleSheetsA
tags.description:
Provides admin-only Google Sheets and Google Drive integration endpoints for downloading files and reading sheet data.
These endpoints support import and reporting workflows that rely on externally hosted spreadsheet content.

tags.name: HtmlPageTemplatesA
tags.description:
Provides admin-only CRUD endpoints for system and tenant HTML page templates.
These templates are used to render hosted HTML documents, branded pages, and exported content.

tags.name: HttpQueriesA
tags.description:
Provides admin-only management of saved HTTP query definitions used for external integrations.
Queries can be created, updated, copied between companies, and associated with integration-specific permissions.

tags.name: ModuleAppRoleA
tags.description:
Allows Admin to manage the ModuleAppRole entities, which represent the permissions for different modules in the application.
Companies can use them to map  designations to these ModuleAppRoles to grant permissions to users with those designations.

tags.name: SubscriptionPlansA
tags.description:
Provides admin-only CRUD endpoints for subscription plan definitions.
Subscription plans control the pricing and feature tiers available to companies across the platform.

tags.name: UsersA
tags.description: Provides API for managing the user accounts for the users with Admin role.

tags.name: ContactToContactTypeMaps
tags.description:
Manages the mapping between contacts and contact types within a company.
Associates contacts with one or more classifications for organization and filtering.
